channel.title: Bare-Metal on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Bare-Metal on Pi Stack

item.title: MAAS vs Cobbler vs Tinkerbell: Bare Metal Provisioning Guide 2026
item.description: Deploying operating systems onto physical servers by hand is one of the most time-consuming tasks in any data center or homelab. Even with modern cloud-native tooling, the physical layer still exists — and someone needs to turn bare metal into running machines. That is where bare metal provisioning tools come in.
